mnemonics: Split the pie, lose the pie
Half and half, or bye and bye
keyPoints: The Ultimatum Game is a classic experiment in Game Theory
In the game, two players receive a sum of money to divide between them
One player proposes a division of the money, the other accepts or rejects it
If the proposal is rejected, neither player gets any money
The game is often used to study fairness, cooperation, and human behavior in negotiations
